questionHtml:
The diagram shows the longitudinal section of phloem tissue at a plant source.

 

What is a function of the structures labelled X?

A. To provide the companion cell with carbon dioxide

B. To provide the companion cell with glucose

C. To allow movement of sucrose into the sieve tube

D. To allow movement of starch into the sieve tube

meta.title: The diagram shows the longitudinal section of phloem tissue at a plant source. What is a function of the structures labelled X? A. To provide the companion cell with carbon dioxide
breadcrumbLabels: B3.2.18. Adaptations of phloem sieve tubes and companion cells for translocation of sap
